description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered, multi-toned shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the structure features a prominent chimney rising from the roof. On one side, there is a covered porch supported by sturdy wooden posts, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The windows are arranged in a symmetrical pattern, with a set of three rectangular windows grouped together and two smaller square windows above. The overall appearance suggests a cozy, traditional dwelling suitable for residential use in a natural or suburban setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement. The exterior features weathered wood and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the cabin with the covered porch, three grouped rectangular windows, and two small square windows above, as well as the chimney.
description_view_1: This top-down view highlights the shingled gable roof and shows the window shutters on the side wall, with the chimney visible near the roof ridge.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite side of the cabin with the same window arrangement and porch structure.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the front of the cabin, displaying the full width of the porch and the overhanging roof, with the chimney offset to one side.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with overhangs, covered in weathered shingles, featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Three medium-sized rectangular windows grouped together on the main wall, with two small square windows above; symmetrical arrangement
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the front facade, opening onto the covered porch
